TM Series Flat Slide Performance Carburetor - 36 mm
Flat slide design helps create a smooth bore effect, increasing air flow
Significant performance improvements over older round slide carbs
Great throttle response because of more precise fuel metering
Jetting may need to be changed per application
Made in Japan
TMX Series Flat Slide Performance Carburetor - 38 mm
Lightweight, flat slide design with smooth bore venturi provides improved throttle response and a wider powerband
Baffled chamber enclosing main jet allows for improved performance on rough terrain
Twin floats move independently to improve cornering and acceleration performance
Use Mikuni jets and parts for best results
Made in Japan
Jetting may need to be changed per application.

High Performance Super BN Carburetor - 44 mm
Externally adjustable metering screws and replacement jets make high and low-speed tuning easy
Special needle valves and springs give optimum pop-off with larger high and low speed jets
Specifically designed to meet the needs of high horsepower racing watercraft
Made in Japan
Radial Flat Slide Carburetor Set - RS Series 34 4-Cylinder
Designed for inline four-cylinder performance to offer higher horsepower gains with the world's top motorcycle road race and drag race teams
Offer smooth, controllable throttle response with precise fuel-metering demands with high-volume fuel/air required by race engines
Flat throttle valve design provides the strongest signal for precise and instantaneous throttle response
Accelerator pump spray nozzle shoots fuel directly into the intake tract for immediate engine response
Check carb spacing to verify fitments; use spacing chart on how to check spacing
Float bowl vent allows atmospheric pressure into float bowl for fuel flow
Include adjustable accelerator pump and adjustable idle screw
Adjustable throttle return spring allows spring return pressure
Includes enrichment starter system for easier cold starting
Jet needle has easy adjustment slots for quick tuning
Use Genuine Mikuni jets and parts for best results
Made in Japan
Jetting may need to be changed per application, see chart for included jetting.
Larger-diameter spigot O.D.'s may require different mounting flanges.
Radial Flat Slide Carburetor Set - RS Series 36 4-Cylinder

Includes enrichment starter system for easier cold starting

Use Genuine Mikuni jets and parts for best results
Made in Japan
